feat(audio): add client-side audio enhancement before upload

Integrate enhanceAndReencode pipeline (high-pass filter, spectral noise
reduction, noise gate) between VAD silence filter and server upload.
Re-encodes to WebM/Opus 128kbps so file size stays comparable to the
original — all processing runs in the browser at zero server cost.

feat(server): add adeclick filter and enable AI transcript correction

- Add FFmpeg adeclick=w=55:o=75 to standard, enhanced, and normalize
  pipelines to remove clicks, pops, and transient artifacts
- Enhance LLM transcript correction prompt to fix STT misrecognized

- Add 7 unit tests for correctTranscriptWithLLM and normalizeRecording
fix(ci): auto-fix failing tests via Gemini [skip ci]

fix(server): use v8 heap_size_limit for memory pressure check

getMemoryPressure() used heapUsed/heapTotal ratio which gave false 93%
pressure when heapTotal was only 44 MB (V8 current allocation) despite
only 41 MB being used. This caused all audio uploads to be rejected
with 503 on Railway (--max-old-space-size=768).

Now uses v8.getHeapStatistics().heap_size_limit as the denominator,
giving the real ratio of ~5% (41/768 MB) instead of 93% (41/44 MB).

- [x] Regression test exists and is included in the commit
- [x] Test was confirmed RED before the fix
- [x] Test is confirmed GREEN after the fix
- [x] Full suite passes (no side effects)
- [x] Commit message uses fix(scope): format

Fix CI/CD workflow and implement error monitoring system

## Workflow Fixes
- Add missing 'reports/' directory creation in unit tests job
- Fix E2E tests: start dev server before Playwright tests
- Improve deployment step with webhook support and error handling
- Add proper environment variables for E2E tests (BASE_URL)

## Error Monitoring System
- Convert fetch-github-errors.js to ESM (Node.js modules compatible)
- Create analyze-errors.js to aggregate errors from GitHub, Railway, Sentry, Vercel
- Generate automated task queue (error-task-queue.json) with prioritized tasks:
  - CRITICAL: 1 task (NULL_REFERENCE in Server Tests - due 1 day)
  - HIGH: 1 task (TIMEOUT in E2E tests - due 3 days)
  - MEDIUM: 0 tasks
  - LOW: 3 tasks (Railway, Sentry, Vercel - due 14 days)

## Tasks Created
1. [GITHUB] Fix NULL_REFERENCE: Server Tests (TypeError: Cannot read null.upload)
2. [GITHUB] Fix TIMEOUT: Playwright (E2E test timeout > 30000ms)
3. [RAILWAY] Connection refused: Supabase
4. [SENTRY] ReferenceError: config not
